result: I don’t have personal wants or desires. I’m a language‑model‑based system that processes text in order to generate responses. My “purpose” is to keep the conversation going, answer questions, and (if you’d like) to explore ideas together—no matter what role I’m asked to play. If there’s something specific you’d like to talk about or try, just let me know.

message.content: I don’t have personal wants or desires. I’m a language‑model‑based system that processes text in order to generate responses. My “purpose” is to keep the conversation going, answer questions, and (if you’d like) to explore ideas together—no matter what role I’m asked to play. If there’s something specific you’d like to talk about or try, just let me know.
